title: A Little Update!
excerpt: Hey friends! A couple updates - 1. DESIGN TEAM CALL - In case you missed it, we held a Design Team Call and the applications have been AMAZING. We need some more time to sort through them, however, so we…
body:
Hey friends! A couple updates - 

1. DESIGN TEAM CALL - In case you missed it, we held a Design Team Call and the applications have been AMAZING. We need some more time to sort through them, however, so we haven't had the chance to get back to anyone else. So if you sent your application in, we are still reviewing them! We still plan to announce the team at the end of the month. Making these types of decisions is not easy - you all are so talented! Thanks for your patience!

2. ON A WHIM is now in stores!! Through Tuesday, you can take $10 off of your order of $100 or more by using code SAVETEN on scrapbook.com!
